title: Crispy Fermented Romano Fries
description: A twist on traditional fries, topped with a fermented romano cheese and crispy pepper bits.
instructions: Heat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
Slice the fries into thin strips and fry until crispy.
In a separate pan, melt the Mexican Romano Cheese over low heat.
Add the Fermented Pepper Paste to the cheese and stir to combine.
Add the crispy pepper bits to the cheese mixture and stir to combine.
Drain the fries on paper towels and season with salt.
Serve the fries topped with the cheese mixture.
